messages.content: make meme for my ugly face
School ki yaadein aur ye Ugly Face Problem, dono hi badi relatable hain yaar!
[MEME][T06] When school teacher asks a question and you didn't do last night's homework: "Udhay Chopra ki acting jaisa blank face" (Relatable) #SchoolLife
[MEME][T03] The relatable take on being the 'ugly friend': "Mere friends post Insta-worthy selfies. Main? Crop-out material" #FriendGoals
[MEME][T04] Me trying to look cute for school photo day: "Result? Failed attempt by Fair & Lovely ka ad" (Funny)
make meme for my ugly face
School ki yaad hai toh Chai aur Bunty aur Babli ki film ki tarha lagegi - wohi puraana drama aur isi liye relatable!
[MEME][T07] My last two braincells about school: "Homework hai ya jail ki saza?" (Relatable)
[MEME][T01] Me when the teacher asks a question: "Wahi sawal repeat kar do, meri wifi slow hai!" (Relatable)
[MEME][T06] When school gets cancelled: "Dil garden garden ho gaya!" (Relatable)
